_meta.description: D6 fixtures for agno / gen-ui-open-advanced — delegates to gen-ui-open.json (same file, shared fixtures)
_meta.note: The D5 script registers fixtureFile='gen-ui-open.json' for gen-ui-open-advanced, so aimock loads gen-ui-open.json for both features. This file exists for completeness but the canonical fixtures live in gen-ui-open.json.
